channel.title: Hourly Kabir Das Dohas
channel.description: Timeless wisdom by Sant Kabir Das

item.title: दुर्लभ मानुष जन्म है, देह न बारम्बार । तरुवर ज्यों पत्ती झड़े, बहुरि न लागे डार ॥
item.description:
Meaning: Human birth is rare; this body is not gained again and again. Like a leaf falls from a tree and never returns to the branch.

Translation: Human life is rare, it comes not again. Like a fallen leaf that never returns to the branch.
item.guid: दुर्लभ मानुष जन्म है, देह न बारम्बार । तरुवर ज्यों पत्ती झड़े, बहुरि न लागे डार ॥493786

item.title: जग में बैरी कोई नहीं, जो मन शीतल होय । यह आपा तो डारि दे, दया करे सब कोय ॥
item.description:
Meaning: No one is your enemy if your mind is calm. If you drop your ego, everyone will show you compassion.

Translation: No one is your foe if your mind is cool. Drop your ego, and the world will be kind to you.
item.guid: जग में बैरी कोई नहीं, जो मन शीतल होय । यह आपा तो डारि दे, दया करे सब कोय ॥493787

item.title: साईं से लगन लगाये रख, फल की इच्छा त्याग । जब समय आएगा तेरा, बदल जाएगा भाग ॥
item.description:
Meaning: Keep your devotion to the Lord and give up the desire for fruits. When your time comes, your fate will change.

Translation: Stay devoted to the Lord, forget the reward. When the time is right, your luck will turn.
item.guid: साईं से लगन लगाये रख, फल की इच्छा त्याग । जब समय आएगा तेरा, बदल जाएगा भाग ॥493788
